# Third-party browser assets

The files in this directory are local copies of the same pinned browser assets
previously loaded from public CDNs. They are included locally to reduce runtime
connections and improve reliability.

- Bootstrap 3.3.6: MIT License
- Font Awesome Free 6.4.0 and 6.5.2: Font Awesome Free License
- Inter v20: SIL Open Font License 1.1
- Leaflet 1.9.4: BSD 2-Clause License
- Splide 4.1.3: MIT License

See each project's upstream distribution for its complete license text.
